application_type.description: Specifies the type of application to be monitored, such as web, other, or mobile.

disable_ip_masking.description: Determines whether IP masking is disabled, which could allow full IP addresses to be logged.

force_customer_storage_for_profiler.description: Indicates whether to force the use of customer-provided storage for performance profiler data.

internet_ingestion_enabled.description: Specifies if data ingestion from the internet is enabled for the Application Insights resource.

internet_query_enabled.description: Specifies if querying Application Insights data from the internet is allowed.

local_authentication_disabled.description: Indicates whether local authentication methods are disabled for accessing the Application Insights resource.

name.description: The name of the Application Insights resource.

retention_in_days.description: The number of days to retain data in the Application Insights resource.

sampling_percentage.description: The percentage of data to sample, which helps control the amount of data collected.

tags.description: A map of tags to associate with the Application Insights resource for categorization and organization.

workspace_id.description: The ID of the Log Analytics workspace to link with the Application Insights resource.

resource_group_name.description: Name of the resource group that this resource will be created in.

location.description: Location that this resource will be created in. (e.g. eastus2, southeastasia)
